pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh cleanup scripts, and verifier.py database query expectations
Python script generating dummy files in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh checks
setup_task.sh cleanup path and export_result.sh directory check path

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a Music On Hold (MOH) class in Vicidial. The target MOH ID is 'HOLIDAY25' with the name 'Holiday Promo 2025'. The audio assets are synthetically generated WAV files named 'holiday_jingle.wav' and 'seasonal_offer.wav' created dynamically via a python script in setup_task.sh. These files are expected to be uploaded to Vicidial's base MOH directory at '/var/lib/asterisk/mohmp3'. All configuration details and target paths have been verified by analyzing the task setup and validation scripts.
